title: Prince of Persia
edition_pinned: Prince of Persia Nintendo UK Virtual Console (Wii) listing for the 2012 Wii release of the SNES edition, observed 2026-07-13; row describes the original 1989 Prince of Persia design.
moat: Committed animation and a global rescue timer make every observed trap a wager between caution and lost time.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: A small movement and sword-fighting kit recombines through room geometry, traps, guards, and time pressure.
exemplar_rationale: Defines cinematic platforming through physical commitment, environmental reading, and one campaign-wide clock.

evidence.claim: Nintendo UK Virtual Console product page listed Categories: Action, Adventure and called the re-release faithful.
